title: Weekly Pattern Review Output Schema
description: Defines the expected JSON output contract for a weekly behavioral friction pattern review synthesized from multiple single-loop analysis results.

review_summary.description: Two to four factual sentences summarizing the week's behavioral friction picture. No encouragement or emotional framing. States what patterns were observed and how severe they were.
examples: Three distinct loop leaks were identified in the review period. Decision avoidance was the dominant friction category across 3 of 5 analyzed loops. The highest-severity pattern involved repeated revisit of a job listing across 6 sessions with no closure action. One quick closure opportunity was identified involving a low-revisit task item.

top_loop_leaks.description: The top loop leaks by severity level for the review period. Ordered by severity descending.

object_name.description: Name or title of the digital object at the center of the loop.

loop_type.description: The classified loop type from the single-loop analysis.

severity_level.description: Severity level from the single-loop analysis result.

summary.description: One factual sentence summarizing this loop leak.

repeated_friction_categories.description: Friction categories that appeared in two or more single-loop analysis results for this review period.

recurring_blockers.description: Blocker descriptions that recurred across two or more single-loop analysis results. Empty array if no recurring blockers exist.

items.description: One sentence describing the recurring blocker.
examples: Unclear application criteria appeared in 3 loop results
No defined send threshold observed across 2 draft-related loops

quick_closure_opportunities.description: Patterns or objects where a simple next action is likely to produce closure based on the loop analysis data. Empty array if no quick closures are apparent.

items.description: One sentence describing the closure opportunity.
examples: Task 'Schedule dentist appointment' has 2 revisits and a clear next action — schedule the call
Draft 'Thank you note - interview' has 1 edit and no blocker — send or discard

highest_severity_patterns.description: Descriptions of the highest-severity behavioral patterns identified in the review period. Ordered by severity descending.

items.description: One factual sentence describing the high-severity pattern.
examples: Job listing 'Senior PM - Acme Corp' has been revisited 7 times across 6 sessions with no closure
Draft cover letter has 4 edits across 4 sessions with 0 send events

next_week_interventions.description: Specific, actionable interventions recommended for the next period. Each tied to a specific pattern or friction category. Not generic advice. Maximum 5 entries.

items.description: One specific intervention. Tied to an identified pattern.
examples: Apply or discard 'Senior PM - Acme Corp' listing within the first session of next week
Set a word-count limit and send-by date for all active email drafts
For recurring defer cycles: require a concrete dependency name before deferring again

confidence_band.description: Overall confidence level for the weekly review synthesis.

needs_human_review.description: True if multiple loop results flagged needs_human_review, a critical severity pattern is present with no clear intervention, or the data is sparse or contradictory.

review_reason.description: Required if needs_human_review is true. Null otherwise.
examples: 3 of 5 loop results flagged needs_human_review — human validation recommended before acting on weekly recommendations

examples.review_summary: Three distinct loop leaks were identified in the review period. Decision avoidance was the dominant friction category across 3 of 5 analyzed loops. The highest-severity pattern involved repeated revisit of a job listing across 6 sessions with no closure action. One quick closure opportunity was identified involving a low-revisit task item.

top_loop_leaks.summary: Revisited 7 times across 6 sessions with no application or discard event.
Edited 4 times across 4 sessions with 0 send events recorded.
Reopened 3 times across 3 sessions with no edit or share event.

recurring_blockers: Unclear criteria for commitment action appeared in 2 loop results
No defined send or completion threshold observed in 2 draft-related loops
quick_closure_opportunities: Task 'Schedule dentist appointment' has 2 revisits and a clear next action — make the call
highest_severity_patterns: Job listing 'Senior PM - Acme Corp' revisited 7 times across 6 sessions with no closure
Draft cover letter edited 4 times with no send event across 4 sessions
next_week_interventions: Apply or discard the 'Senior PM - Acme Corp' listing within the first session of next week
Set a send-by date for the draft cover letter — no further edits after that date
For all deferred items: require a named blocker before deferring again
